title: aspidium cicutarium
intro: Aspidium cicutarium, also known as the cut-leaved fern or the lesser shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aspidium cicutarium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antacid. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, tincture, or dried form for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
